chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-4849 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of case [Priority] 1. For hearing of Misc. No.22226 of 2023 2. For hearing of main case 31.10.2024 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, Advocate for Respondents Mr. Shah Hussain, Deputy Attorney General, Pakistan ************ None present on behalf of the Petitioner; however, perusal of the prayer clause reflects that this petition has now become infructuous. Accordingly, the same is dismissed having become infructuous along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
